untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of candle height ratio to median value: (high - low) / breakout_price vs median. The 'breakout_price' is not defined in allowed indicators, and median calculation across historical candles is not supported. Additionally, the exact exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with incomplete measurement rules. The pattern requires dynamic threshold comparison (median) which cannot be expressed with static allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Belt Hold pattern identifies tall vs short candles by height ratio. Attempted approximation using range > atr_14 as proxy for 'tall candle' detection, but this does not accurately capture the (high-low)/breakout_price ratio comparison to median threshold specified in the rule. Exit conditions are incomplete per source material. Success rates and volume trends are all marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Recommend manual implementation or clarification of breakout_price definition and median calculation methodology.
